name: Cube Rush 3D: Survive The Rush
description: Get ready for Cube Rush 3D, the ultimate high-speed physics runner! Surf through a vibrant low-poly world, stacking glowing cubes to soar over obstacles and dodge deadly lava pools. Master the lane-based controls to collect coins, unlock epic skins, and build the tallest stack possible. With dynamic level generation and smooth 3D graphics, every run offers a fresh challenge. Can you maintain your balance and reach the finish line? Stack, slide, and survive in this addictive 3D rush!
instructions: Desktop Move Click and Drag Mouse left right Mobile Move Drag left or right with your finger Goal Collect Yellow Cubes to grow your stack Avoid Red
